details: The “NIPUN Bharat Mission” is a scheme under the Samagra Shiksha Programme, implemented by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to ensure that all children aged 3 to 9 achieve foundational literacy and numeracy by creating an enabling learning environment across all schools in Uttarakhand.
benefits: Under this mission, all children can get admission in Class 1 as per the admission norms of all schools in the state.
eligibility: The beneficiary must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
All children aged 3 to 9 years are eligible to benefit from the scheme to achieve foundational literacy and numeracy.

offline: The main objective of the Nipun Bharat Mission is to create an enabling environment to ensure universal attainment of basic literacy and numeracy. Admissions can be obtained in Class 1 as per admission norms in all schools of the state.

documents_required: Documents are required as per the guidelines of the respective schools.

faqs.question: What is the main objective of the Mission?
faqs.answer: The main objective is to ensure that all children aged 3 to 9 achieve foundational literacy and numeracy through a supportive and effective learning environment.

faqs.question: Who are the beneficiaries of the mission?
faqs.answer: All children in the age group of 3 to 9 years are the beneficiaries.

faqs.question: Can children get admission in Class 1 under this mission?
faqs.answer: Yes, all eligible children can get admission in Class 1 as per the admission norms of all schools in the state.

faqs.question: Is the mission applicable to all schools in Uttarakhand?
faqs.answer: Yes, the mission is implemented across all government and recognized schools in the state.

faqs.question: Are there any specific documents required for admission?
faqs.answer: Documents are required as per the admission guidelines of the respective schools.
